nodes.name: Red-bellied malimbe
nodes.summary: The red-bellied malimbe (Malimbus erythrogaster) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Nigeria, South Sudan, and Uganda. References

nodes.name: Red-bellied malimbe
nodes.summary: Red-bellied malimbe（Malimbus erythrogaster）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-bellied malimbe。

nodes.name: Malimbus
nodes.summary: Malimbus（Malimbus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Red-crowned malimbe、Rachel's malimbe、Red-vented malimbe等9种鸟类。
